snippet.title: iPhone 17 Pro Review: One Month Later as my Daily Driver
snippet.description:
It's been exactly one month since I started using the iPhone 17 Pro as my main, daily driver phone. I'm coming from an iPhone 15 Pro (I skipped the 16 Pro entirely) and was waiting for a real reason to upgrade. After 30 days, I can honestly say this is a significant jump... but there are some major things you need to know.

We're covering everything in this video: this new unibody aluminum design, the "scratchgate" controversy, and why I chose the Silver model. We'll also talk about the A19 Pro performance, the incredible new vapor chamber cooling system (a game-changer for me as a creator), the battery life after 30 days, and of course, the new "Triple 48" camera system and that wild new front-facing camera.

If you're on a 15 Pro, a 14 Pro, or anything older and wondering if this is the year to upgrade, this video is for you.

Let me know your thoughts in the comments!

IN THIS VIDEO:
Intro & Why I Upgraded from the 15 Pro 
What Was So Special at Launch? 
Design, Display, and That Camera "Plateau" 
The "Downgrade," "Scratchgate," & Why I Chose Silver 
The Game-Changer: Thermals and the Vapor Chamber 
Performance: This Feels Like a Laptop (A19 Pro) 
Battery Life: One Month Report 
The "Triple 48" Camera System (This is HUGE) 
Apple Intelligence (And My "Real" AI Tools) 
Downsides & Considerations 
Conclusion: Watch This Before You Upgrade

X: https://x.com/HowFixit

*Description*
In this HowFixit guide, I’ll show you how to replace a cracked, broken, or defective iPhone 17 Pro screen from start to finish. We’ll cover tools, safe opening, adhesive softening, disconnecting display and sensor cables, transferring the proximity/ambient light flex to the new panel, reassembly, Repair Assistant calibration via Parts & Service History, touch testing, and restoring water resistance with new adhesive sealing tape.
🔧Tools used: precision screwdriver set (Pentalobe 0.8, Torx T4, Tri-Wing 0.8, Phillips 1), plastic pry tools, tweezers, suction cup, screen disassembly tool, magnetic mat, isopropyl alcohol (≥91%), adhesive sealing tape.
If this helped, hit 👍 and subscribe for more DIY repairs!

🎬Timecodes
00:00 Intro to iPhone 17 Pro screen replacement tutorial
00:18 Tools checklist + pro tip: magnetic mat
01:01 Power off & remove USB-C Pentalobe screws
01:15 Heat screen (90 °C for 60–90s)
01:32 How to open an iPhone 17 Pro
01:53 Screen separation
03:20 Disconnect display & front-sensor cables
03:45 Transfer proximity/ambient light flex
06:05 Install flex on new screen + secure screws
07:00 Reconnect display cables; close and power on
07:20 Calibrate Screen via Parts & Service History
07:35 Touchscreen test (dead zones check)
09:00 Remove old adhesive; clean frame with IPA
11:40 Apply new waterproof sealing tape
12:08 Reconnect screen
12:36 Final checks, tips & outro

🌟FAQ:
❓Question: Will I lose data during a screen replacement?
✔️Answer: No. The display swap doesn’t erase data, but back up your iPhone first.

❓Question: Why is calibration required after replacement?
✔️Answer: Repair Assistant (via Parts & Service History) pairs the new display and optimizes touch/brightness features like True Tone.

❓Question: My touch has dead zones after install—what now?
✔️Answer: Re-seat display connectors, check for debris, and re-run calibration. If persistent, the panel or connector may be faulty.

❓Question: Is water resistance fully restored?
✔️Answer: Only if you install new adhesive sealing tape correctly. Resealing reduces risk but doesn’t guarantee factory water resistance.

snippet.description:
The iPhone 17 Pro Max Silver 1TB — Apple’s most elegant flagship yet.
This video captures the decorated aesthetic setup of the latest iPhone 17 Pro Max in its stunning silver finish. From the reflective titanium frame to the smooth ProMotion display, every angle of this phone screams modern minimalism and luxury.

Product Details:
The iPhone 17 Pro Max Silver introduces Apple’s A19 Pro chip, upgraded ProMotion XDR display, and refined titanium design — built for creators, professionals, and tech lovers who value performance wrapped in elegance.

Key Features:
 • A19 Pro Chip for next-gen performance
 • 6.9-inch ProMotion XDR Display (1–120 Hz)
 • Triple-Lens Camera with AI Fusion 3.0
 • All-Day Battery + 30 W USB-C Fast Charging
 • Titanium Frame with Ceramic Shield Protection

Box Contents:
 • iPhone 17 Pro Max Silver 1TB
 • USB-C Cable
 • Apple Documentation
 • SIM Eject Tool

Specifications:
 • Processor: A19 Pro 3 nm Chip
 • Storage: 1TB NV-Flash
 • Camera: 48 MP Main + 12 MP Ultra Wide + 12 MP Telephoto
 • Display: 6.9” LTPO OLED 120 Hz
 • Build: Titanium + Ceramic Shield Glass

Unboxing and decorating the iPhone 17 Pro Max Silver 1TB shows why this model defines 2025 luxury tech. It blends power, performance, and simplicity like never before. In this setup video, you’ll see the silver edition styled in a calm, minimalist environment — made for Tier-1 Apple fans across the US, UK, Canada, and Australia. Whether you’re comparing iPhone 17 Pro Max vs iPhone 16 Pro Max, exploring A19 Pro chip performance, or searching for the most aesthetic iPhone setup in 2025, this video has you covered.

snippet.title: Así se ve Chile a través del nuevo iPhone 17 Pro Max 🇨🇱
snippet.description:
En este video te llevo al Centro Cultural Gabriela Mistral (GAM), donde Apple lanzó la exposición “Los Ojos del Territorio”, una muestra fotográfica impresionante que recorre Chile de norte a sur, capturada completamente con el iPhone 17 Pro Max. 🇨🇱📱

Estuve presente en el evento de lanzamiento oficial, donde tres destacados fotógrafos chilenos —Tomás Westenenk, Nay Jiménez y Cristián Aninat— presentaron sus obras creadas únicamente con la cámara del nuevo iPhone. Una verdadera locura ver cómo la tecnología puede transformarse en arte cuando se usa con propósito.

En este recorrido te muestro:

✨ Cómo se vivió el evento de Apple en el GAM.
📷 Las historias detrás de las fotografías más impactantes.
🌄 Los paisajes de Chile capturados desde el desierto hasta la Patagonia.
⚙️ El potencial real del iPhone 17 Pro Max para crear contenido profesional.
💭 Una reflexión personal sobre cómo la tecnología puede inspirar nuestra creatividad.

Esta exposición, curada por Paula Solimano, busca conectar el territorio externo con el interno, combinando arte, emoción y tecnología. Si eres creador, amante de la fotografía, del cine o simplemente te inspiran las historias visuales, este video es para ti.

🎥 Todo lo que ves aquí fue grabado con dispositivos Apple, aprovechando al máximo las cámaras del iPhone.
La exposición está disponible hasta el 13 de noviembre en el GAM (Santiago, Chile), y la entrada es gratuita.
